name: fintech-wyden
comment:overrides: react-dom (pulled transitively) requires react@^19.2.7, so React is pinned at 19.2.7. jest-expo ships react-test-renderer@19.2.3, which then loads the hoisted react@19.2.7 and mismatches ('Can't access .root on unmounted test renderer'). Force react-test-renderer to the same 19.2.7 so the test renderer and React agree.
